outreachPreview.name: Shawn Townzen
outreachPreview.subject: Exploring Opportunities at Walmart
outreachPreview.htmlContent:
Hi Shawn Townzen,

I hope you're doing well.

I came across Walmart and noticed your role on the team.

I'm a Computer Science student actively seeking Software Development Engineer opportunities. Recently, I built an end-to-end B2B prospecting and outreach automation platform integrating Ocean.io, Prospeo, Eazyreach, and Brevo, along with several full-stack development projects.

I wanted to ask if there are any open SDE, Backend Engineer, Full-Stack Engineer, or New Graduate opportunities at Walmart. If appropriate, I would also greatly appreciate a referral or guidance regarding relevant openings.

I'd be happy to share my resume, portfolio, and project details.


Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Shubhanshi Gupta

outreachPreview.htmlContent:
Hi Shawn Townzen,

I came across Walmart and noticed your role in the team.

We help companies discover similar high-intent prospects and automate outreach pipelines end-to-end.

Would you be open to a quick conversation?
